sources.title: Lily Ray - E-E-A-T Resource Page
sources.note: Lily Ray's comprehensive E-E-A-T resource page with articles, videos, conference decks, webinars, and podcasts. Google referenced her BrightonSEO E-E-A-T presentation.

sources.title: Search Engine Journal Author Page - Lily Ray
sources.note: Lily Ray's published articles on Search Engine Journal covering E-E-A-T misconceptions, quality rater guidelines, and Google algorithm updates.

sources.title: E-A-T Algorithms and the Complexity of Google Search with Lily Ray - Traject
sources.note: Podcast interview with Lily Ray discussing E-E-A-T algorithms and Google search complexity.

sources.title: How the E-A-T Ecosystem has Transformed Organic Search - MozCon 2021
sources.note: Lily Ray's MozCon 2021 conference presentation on how E-A-T ecosystem has transformed organic search. SlideShare deck from major SEO conference.
